requirement_topic.en: RURA Type Approval — Radio and Telecommunications Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: RURA型式批准——无线电及电信终端设备
requirement_topic.zht: RURA型式批准——無線電及電信終端設備

summary.en: All radio transmitters and telecommunications terminal equipment must obtain a RURA type approval certificate from the Rwanda Utilities Regulatory Authority before importation or sale in Rwanda, under the Law Governing Telecommunications in Rwanda (Law No. 02/2016) and associated RURA regulations on ICT equipment. The type approval process requires the applicant to submit a technical file and test reports from accredited laboratories. CE marking, FCC authorisation, and CCC certification are not recognised as equivalents by RURA. EAC harmonised type approval is developing but wireless device type approval remains nationally enforced by RURA. The RURA approval certificate and corresponding label must accompany the product before customs clearance.
summary.zh: 所有无线电发射机及电信终端设备须依据《卢旺达电信管理法》（第02/2016号法律）及RURA相关ICT设备法规，在进口或于卢旺达销售前取得卢旺达电力和水务监管局（RURA）颁发的型式批准证书。型式批准程序要求申请人提交来自认可实验室的技术档案和测试报告。CE标志、FCC授权和CCC认证均不被RURA视为等同认可。东非共同体协调型式批准正在推进，但无线设备型式批准仍由RURA在全国层面执行。产品在海关清关前须附有RURA批准证书及相应标签。
summary.zht: 所有無線電發射機及電信終端設備須依據《盧旺達電信管理法》（第02/2016號法律）及RURA相關ICT設備法規，在進口或於盧旺達銷售前取得盧旺達電力和水務監管局（RURA）頒發的型式批准證書。型式批准程序要求申請人提交來自認可實驗室的技術檔案和測試報告。CE標誌、FCC授權和CCC認證均不被RURA視為等同認可。東非共同體協調型式批准正在推進，但無線設備型式批准仍由RURA在全國層面執行。產品在海關清關前須附有RURA批准證書及相應標籤。

standards_or_laws: Law Governing Telecommunications in Rwanda, Law No. 02/2016 (Rwanda)
RURA Regulations on Type Approval of Telecommunications and ICT Equipment (Rwanda)

summary.en: China MIIT SRRC radio type approval for radio frequency equipment; MIIT network access licence (NAL) for telecommunications terminal equipment; CCC certification for RF equipment within CCC scope. GB standards (e.g. GB 9254, GB 17625 for EMC; GB 4943 for safety) apply domestically. SRRC, NAL, and CCC approvals are China-domestic only and carry no legal standing with the Rwanda Utilities Regulatory Authority.
summary.zh: 中国工信部SRRC无线电型式批准适用于射频设备；工信部电信终端设备进网许可证（NAL）适用于电信终端设备；CCC认证适用于CCC范围内的射频设备。GB标准（如GB 9254、GB 17625电磁兼容；GB 4943安全）在境内适用。SRRC、NAL和CCC批准仅限于中国境内，在卢旺达电力和水务监管局（RURA）不具法律效力。
summary.zht: 中國工信部SRRC無線電型式批准適用於射頻設備；工信部電信終端設備進網許可證（NAL）適用於電信終端設備；CCC認證適用於CCC範圍內的射頻設備。GB標準（如GB 9254、GB 17625電磁相容；GB 4943安全）在境內適用。SRRC、NAL和CCC批准僅限於中國境內，在盧旺達電力和水務監管局（RURA）不具法律效力。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) — Telecommunications Terminal Equipment (China)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — RF equipment in scope (China)

gap.en: Mandatory separate RURA type approval certificate required from the Rwanda Utilities Regulatory Authority under Law No. 02/2016. CE, FCC, and CCC approvals are not accepted by RURA. SRRC and NAL have no legal standing in Rwanda. EAC harmonisation does not yet remove the RURA national type approval requirement for wireless devices. The RURA type approval certificate and label must accompany the product before customs clearance.
gap.zh: 须依据第02/2016号法律另行取得卢旺达电力和水务监管局（RURA）颁发的强制性型式批准证书。CE、FCC和CCC批准不被RURA接受。SRRC和NAL在卢旺达不具法律效力。东非共同体协调尚未取消无线设备的RURA国家型式批准要求。产品在海关清关前须附有RURA型式批准证书及标签。
gap.zht: 須依據第02/2016號法律另行取得盧旺達電力和水務監管局（RURA）頒發的強制性型式批准證書。CE、FCC和CCC批准不被RURA接受。SRRC和NAL在盧旺達不具法律效力。東非共同體協調尚未取消無線設備的RURA國家型式批准要求。產品在海關清關前須附有RURA型式批准證書及標籤。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RURA type approval is mandatory for all radio and telecommunications terminal equipment imported or sold in Rwanda under Law No. 02/2016. Chinese SRRC, NAL, and CCC approvals are not recognised by RURA. CE and FCC authorisations are likewise not accepted. A separate RURA type approval process must be completed and the RURA certificate and label must accompany the product before customs clearance. EAC harmonisation does not currently waive this national requirement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据第02/2016号法律，RURA型式批准对于所有在卢旺达进口或销售的无线电及电信终端设备均属强制要求。中国SRRC、NAL和CCC批准不被RURA承认，CE和FCC授权同样不被接受。须完成独立的RURA型式批准程序，产品在海关清关前须附有RURA证书及标签。东非共同体协调目前不免除该国家要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據第02/2016號法律，RURA型式批准對於所有在盧旺達進口或銷售的無線電及電信終端設備均屬強制要求。中國SRRC、NAL和CCC批准不被RURA承認，CE和FCC授權同樣不被接受。須完成獨立的RURA型式批准程序，產品在海關清關前須附有RURA證書及標籤。東非共同體協調目前不免除該國家要求。
